group.name: Your name and description for this node

string.name: Route Name
string.description: A name for this route(ex: Track 1, Track 1 West -> Track 2)

string.name: Sensor Name
string.description: Sensor used for the route. Only used for debug purposes

int.name: Input type
int.description: Inputs can be either on the board itself, or come from a remote board using Event IDs

int.name: Polarity
int.description: Polarity is only used if using an input on the board

eventid.name: Event sensor on
eventid.description: The event ID consumed by this device to indicate that the sensor is active

eventid.name: Event sensor off
eventid.description: The event ID consumed by this device to indicate that the sensor is inactive

string.name: Switch Name
string.description: Switch used for the route. Only used for debug purposes

int.name: Input type
int.description: Inputs can be either on the board itself, or come from a remote board using Event IDs

int.name: Polarity
int.description: Polarity is only used if using an input on the board

int.name: Route position
int.description: The position that the switch needs to be in for this route to be valid

eventid.name: Event switch normal
eventid.description: The event ID consumed by this device to indicate that the switch is in the normal position

eventid.name: Event switch reversed
eventid.description: The event ID consumed by this device to indicate that the switch is in the reversed position

eventid.name: Gate Active Event
eventid.description: This event is sent(produced) by this node when the gates are active

eventid.name: Gate Deactivated Event
eventid.description: This event is sent(produced) by this node when the gates are deactivated

eventid.name: Manual Activation
eventid.description: This event is received(consumed) by this node in order to trigger the gates to become activated

eventid.name: Input activated
eventid.description: This event is sent(produced) by this node when the input is activated

eventid.name: Input deactivated
eventid.description: This event is sent(produced) by this node when the input is deactivated

int.name: Timeout
int.description: Timeout value for the system to reset and become 'inactive.' This value is in seconds

int.name: Bell Behavior
int.description: How the bell output should behave

relation.value: Ring while gates lowering and raising

int.name: Bell ring time
int.description: Bell ring time(in milliseconds) when gates are raising/lowering
